name: Ultraman Z
overview: The newest Ultra Hero is Ultraman Zett, the disciple of Ultraman Zero, who is now celebrating his tenth anniversary! An admirer of Zero, Zett worked hard to become a member of the “Inter Galactic Defense Force.” With a passion inherited from his teacher Zero, Zett is an Ultraman who always looks forward and forges ahead.

trailers.title: "ULTRAMAN Z" New Official Video Released! Transformation Items & Three New Forms Revealed!
ウルトラマンZ : Chant My Name! / ご唱和くださいわれの名を short ver.
